summary: VenuLoQ iteration 88 - New app icon setup and swipe hint animation testing. All features passed (100%).

favicon_ico.details: GET /favicon.ico returns HTTP 200. File exists (485 bytes).

favicon_32x32.details: GET /favicon-32x32.png returns HTTP 200. File exists (1155 bytes).

apple_touch_icon.details: GET /apple-touch-icon.png returns HTTP 200. File exists (21322 bytes).

manifest_json.details: Manifest loads correctly with name='VenuLoQ', short_name='VenuLoQ', theme_color='#0B0B0D', background_color='#0B0B0D', 4 icons (16x16, 32x32, 192x192, 512x512).

page_title.details: Page title is 'VenuLoQ | We Negotiate. You Celebrate.'

mobile_search_page.details: Mobile search page (/venues/search) loads with 60+ venue cards displayed. All cards show name, location, type, capacity, price.

venue_card_dots.details: Dot indicators (data-testid='venue-card-dots-*') present on cards with multiple images.

quick_preview_modal.details: Eye icon click opens Quick Preview bottom sheet modal showing rating (4.9), venue name, location, type, capacity, amenities (Parking, AC, Catering, DJ, Alcohol), and price.

swipe_hint_animation.details: Swipe hint (data-testid='swipe-hint') appears on first venue card at ~1.2s, shows '< SWIPE >' with bounce animation, auto-dismisses at ~3.5s.

swipe_hint_session.details: Session flag 'venuloq_swipe_hint_seen' set to '1' after hint dismisses, preventing re-show on same session.

login_flow.details: Login with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 works. Redirects to /my-enquiries with 'Welcome back!' message and user dashboard.

context_for_next_testing_agent: New app icon (gold Q with location pin + keyhole on dark background) is set up correctly. Icons: favicon.ico (16x16), favicon-16x16.png, favicon-32x32.png, icon-192.png, icon-512.png, apple-touch-icon.png. Swipe hint animation on first venue card works: appears at 1.2s, shows for ~2.3s, then auto-dismisses and sets sessionStorage flag. Test by clearing sessionStorage.removeItem('venuloq_swipe_hint_seen') before reload.
